name: e-learning-aikids-full
description: Kids AI Creator Academy — full-stack experiential course for ages 8–11

scripts.dev: npm run dev -w @aikids/api & npm run dev -w @aikids/web
scripts.build: npm run build -w @aikids/domain && npm run build -w @aikids/api && npm run build -w @aikids/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @aikids/domain && npm run test -w @aikids/api
scripts.test:all: npm run test -w @aikids/domain && npm run test -w @aikids/api && npm run test -w @aikids/web
scripts.db:setup: npm run free:port && npm run db:generate && npm run db:push && npm run db:seed
scripts.db:setup:reset: npm run free:port && npm run db:generate && npm run db:push:reset && npm run db:seed
